description_long: This rifle features a festive, decorative design with a predominantly red body adorned with white snowflake patterns and green accents. The stock, handguard, and magazine are all painted in a bright red color, while the receiver, barrel, and other metallic components are green. The rifle has a classic AK-style silhouette, with a fixed wooden stock and a curved detachable magazine. The surface appears to be matte with a painted finish, giving it a non-reflective, slightly rough texture. The iron sights are visible on the top, and the muzzle is simple with no additional device attached. The overall appearance is both functional and visually striking, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A festive AK-style rifle with a red and green color scheme, decorated with white snowflake patterns and a matte painted finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the red stock, handguard, and magazine with white snowflake patterns and green receiver and barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the stock and the straight alignment of the rifle's body.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same festive color scheme and decorative patterns.
